headline: Teardown in progress (epic #80). #53 DONE locally on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (not pushed): conservative root-doc consolidation. Deleted 10 stale/transient root .md files with zero script-wiring (CLEANUP_RUN, HDS_COMPLIANCE_LOG, IDEAS, PROCESS, TYPOGRAPHY_MIGRATION_GUIDE, hds-framework-v2.1, hds-recipes, rebuild-manifest, AGENT_CONTEXT_SYSTEM, BACKLOG); salvaged durable packaging-decision content from CLEANUP_RUN into DECISIONS.md. Fixed all 4 dangling doc-refs #50 surfaced (OPERATING_MAP.md, SYSTEMS_REGISTRY.md x2, AGENT_CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md — latter moot since deleted) plus a related dead check:assets row in SYSTEMS_REGISTRY.md (#49 already removed that script) and a BACKLOG.md mention in scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs (regenerated public/llms.txt + llms.txt). TOKEN_MIGRATION.md evaluated and KEPT — it is actively parsed by scripts/check-token-renames.mjs as a pnpm check:full gate, not documentation. Root .md count: 25 -> 15. ADR-018 §7 amended with the conservative-pass record; the deeper collapse-to-5 (README/CONSUMING/CONTRIBUTING/CHANGELOG/ARCHITECTURE) needs ~11 doc-generation/guardrail scripts unwired first — deferred, out of scope this pass. All 9 required gates green (typecheck, lint, build:lib, build-storybook, vitest 1059, smoke:consumer, verify-tokens+check-contrast, pretest, check-attributions+build-design-md) plus check-link-integrity --doc-refs-only reports 0 dangling refs. Noted for follow-up (not touched, docs/ subtree out of scope): docs/LLM_STREAM_SCHEMA.md, docs/SYSTEM_ATLAS.md, docs/figma-plugin/EXECUTION_PLAN.md reference cut subsystems (local-AI layer, Figma bridge) and may be dead. Earlier: #49 DONE (portfolio assets/apps deleted), #50 DONE (local-AI/agent bot layer cut), #51 DONE (legacy docs SPA stripped).
next: Follow-up (deeper cut, out of scope for #53): collapse root docs to ~5 per ADR-018 §7 target — requires unwiring ~11 doc-generation/guardrail scripts that read TOKEN_GOVERNANCE.md, SYSTEMS_REGISTRY.md, OPERATING_MAP.md, DESIGN-HANDOFF.md, ATTRIBUTIONS.md, TOKEN_MIGRATION.md, etc.

Follow-up surfaced by #53: audit docs/LLM_STREAM_SCHEMA.md, docs/SYSTEM_ATLAS.md, docs/figma-plugin/EXECUTION_PLAN.md for dead-subsystem content (local-AI layer #50, Figma bridge ADR-018 §2) — docs/ subtree was explicitly out of scope this pass.

Follow-up surfaced by #50: pipeline/ (figma-masters-batch.mjs, retry-loop.mjs, format-correction.mjs) is still gated via pretest → check:figma-snapshot and wired to ui:gen/ui:fix/ui:masters, which itself calls out to an LLM API — needs a scoped decision (migrate off pipeline/ pretest dependency, or fold pipeline/ into the ADR-018 §3 cut explicitly with a plan for the gate) before it can be removed.

Follow-up hygiene surfaced by #51 (non-blocking): reconcile the 13 pre-existing check-validator-wiring firingChannel/precommit-hash drifts; prune stale paths from knip.config.ts; decide check-reduced-motion Layer-2 semantics for a library (no App.tsx root).
Deferred post-freeze: #60 (cva rollout), #64 (Astro evaluation). Human-owned: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap.
